ideation: This animation sequence simulates the motion of riding an aerial tramway. The robot's arms will mimic the feeling of holding onto a cable or bar while moving along.  The sequence will focus on a slight swaying motion, reflecting the gentle movement of the tramway. Frame 1 will show the robot's arms outstretched, palms down, gripping an imaginary cable. Frame 2 will show a slight upward sway, and Frame 3 a slight downward sway. Frame 4 will return to the initial position, and Frame 5 will show the robot's arms slightly lowered, as if the ride is coming to an end.

frames.beat: arms reach out, gripping the tram cable
a gentle sway upwards on the ride
a slight dip downwards, continuing the journey
holding steady on the cable car
arms lower slightly as the ride concludes
